name: Cranberry Preserves
recipeInstructions:
(Makes about 4 cups.)
1. Peel the apples.
2. Core the apples.
3. Coarsely dice the apples.
4. Heat the sugar and water in a heavy large saucepan over low heat, swirling the pan occasionally until the sugar dissolves.
5. Add the cranberries, diced apples, and lemon peel to the saucepan.
6. Bring the mixture to a boil.
7. Reduce the heat to medium.
8. Cook the mixture until it reaches the consistency of thick jam, stirring frequently for about 20 minutes.
9. Stir in the crème de cassis to taste.
10. Allow the preserves to cool completely before serving.
(Can be stored in the refrigerator for up to 1 month.)
